sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90743" key="proxei/masis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προχείμ-ᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90743.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">premature stormy weather</tr_>, Veget.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.40</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
